name: AWS Core Controls
description: Basic security checks for AWS infrastructure: IAM, RDS, S3, CloudTrail.

rules.description: MFA is enforced for all IAM users
rules.answer_template: Multi-factor authentication (MFA) is enforced for all IAM users. Verified against exported AWS IAM account summary.
rules.exception_template: MFA enforcement is not currently active for all IAM users. Compensating control: [describe alternative]. Remediation planned for [date].

rules.description: Root account access keys are not active
rules.answer_template: Root account access keys are disabled. No active access keys exist for the root account.
rules.exception_template: Root account access keys are currently active. Remediation in progress: [describe]. Target completion: [date].

rules.answer_template: IAM password policy enforces a minimum length of 14 characters, exceeding the common baseline.
rules.exception_template: Password minimum length is below 14 characters. Current setting: [value]. Remediation planned for [date].

rules.answer_template: RDS database storage encryption is enabled at rest using AWS-managed or customer-managed keys.
rules.exception_template: RDS storage encryption is not enabled. Compensating control: [describe]. Migration planned for [date].

rules.description: RDS instances are not publicly accessible
rules.answer_template: RDS instances are configured as not publicly accessible. Database endpoints are restricted to VPC-internal access.
rules.exception_template: One or more RDS instances are publicly accessible. Remediation: [describe network restriction plan]. Target: [date].

rules.description: S3 account-level public access block is enabled
rules.answer_template: S3 public access is blocked at the account level. The BlockPublicAcls setting is enabled.
rules.exception_template: S3 public access block is not enabled at the account level. Remediation: [describe]. Target: [date].

rules.answer_template: S3 bucket versioning is enabled, providing object-level recovery and audit trail.
rules.exception_template: S3 versioning is not enabled on one or more buckets. Compensating control: [describe backup strategy]. Target: [date].

rules.answer_template: AWS CloudTrail is enabled and actively logging API activity across the account.
rules.exception_template: CloudTrail logging is not active. Remediation: [describe]. This is a critical control. Target: [date].

rules.answer_template: CloudTrail is configured for multi-region logging, capturing API activity in all AWS regions.
rules.exception_template: CloudTrail is not configured for multi-region. Currently logging in [region] only. Remediation planned for [date].

rules.answer_template: VPC Flow Logs are enabled, capturing network traffic metadata for monitoring and forensic analysis.
rules.exception_template: VPC Flow Logs are not enabled. Compensating control: [describe network monitoring alternative]. Target: [date].
